title: Old Sound The Wendigo (Skinstalker)
description: Bring back the old The Wendigo (Skinstalker) cave noise sound.
body:
# Introduction
A resource pack that restores the old The Wendigo (Skinstalker) sounds before they were updated to the new sounds.
# Required mod
[The Wendigo (Skinstalker) Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wendigo-jar-dweller/download/5677392)
